raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee laiſhs Pihſchlus ka
Etchuhska/ ka leenami Semmes
Tahrpi tee kustinafees fau̅as
Billis/ tee bihſees preeſch ta
KUNGA muhþu Deewa/ un
ailofees preeſch tewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kur irr tah̅s Deew̅ ka
u? Kas Noseegunu peedohd/
n pamett Bahrfahpfchanu
eem Atlihkfcheem fau̅as Ec-
nantofchanas/ wiſch ne paturr
avu Dufnibu muhſchigt/ jo
vinnam irr labs Prahts pee
Schehlaſtibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſch atgreesiſees pee
nums ar Apschehlofchanu/
wiſch apſlahpehs muhſus No-
egumus/ teefchain tu mettiti
viſſus winan Grehkus Juhras
Osittum̅s.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu eedohſi Jehkabam to
Beetizzibu/ Ahbraamam to
Schehlaſtibu/ ko tu muhſeem
ehweem no wezzahm Deenahm
fi ſwehrejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weens bahrgs Deew̅/ un
weens Atreebejs irr tas KUNGS/
tas KUNGS irr weens Atree-
bejs un fohti bahrgs/tas KUNGS
irr weens Atreebejs prett faweein
Prettiturretajeem/ un paturr to
Dufnibu prett faweein Eenaid-
neekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr lehn-
prahtigs/ un no leela Spehka/
un wiſch tohs (Grehkus) ne-
fohditus ne pamett/ ta KUNga
Zetſch irr eekſch Weesuta un
Wehtras/ un tah̅s Padebbeſis
irr winna Kahju Pihſchli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſch lamna to Juhrn/
un iſkalte to/ un iſschahwe wiſ-
fas Uppes/ Bahsans un Kar-
mels pantheſt/ ir tas Saltums
us Lihbanus panihkſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee Kalni drebb preeſch
winna/ un tee Pakalni iſkuhſt/
ir ta Seine trihſe winna Preek-
ſcha/ un ta Pafaute/ un wiſſi/
kas eekſch tah̅s dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas paſtahwehs preeſch
winna Dufnibus? un kas tur-
retees preeſch ta Karstuma win-
na Bahrsibas? Winna Dufnibu
ba irr iſgahſta ka Ugguns/ un
tee Akmina-Kalni tohp no winna
fagranſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr labs/
weens Stipruus Behou Dees-
na/ un paſihſt tohs/ kas us win-
an patanjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ar weena uſpluhduſcha
Paisuma iſnihzinahs wiſch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
